posts.message:
🍪 81 Boxes to Go for Willow! 🍪
Our daughter Willow is in the final stretch of her Girl Scout Cookie goal of 700 boxes, and she only has 81 boxes left to go!
If you’ve been thinking about stocking up on your favorite cookies, now’s the time!
Not a cookie person? You can still help! Willow also needs just 2 more donated boxes to earn a special reward.
❤️ All donated boxes this year go to Meals on Wheels, helping bring a sweet treat to people in our community.
If you’d like cookies or would like to donate a box, send us a message and we’ll get you taken care of!
Thanks for supporting our girl and small goals that help build big confidence. 💚🍪
— Roswell Family Farm

🥚 SOLD OUT of eggs!
Our hens couldn’t keep up with you all this weekend!! 🐓

Thank you for supporting our self-serve egg stand. We are so grateful for this community!

We’ll post as soon as the fridge is full again. ❤️

🥚 EGG SALE! 🥚
Farm fresh eggs just $2 per dozen! $3/ 18 pack! 
My mom and dad have a bet for today - help clear the shelves so my mom wins!! 
✔️ Self-serve
✔️ Fridge on the porch
✔️ Grab what you need anytime!
📍 955 Thompson Rd, Dolgeville, NY 13329
Stock up while they last! Fresh from our happy hens🐓🥚
